name: Sheldon M. Stone
title: Founder & Chairman
bio: Visionary founder of Oaktree Capital Management with over 40 years of experience in credit and distressed asset management. Founded the firm to pioneer opportunistic investing strategies.

name: Jay Wintrob
title: Chief Executive Officer
bio: Strategic leader driving Oaktree's growth and innovation across all investment strategies. Oversees the entire organization and client relationships worldwide.

name: Manu Bhaskaran
title: President and Chief Operating Officer
bio: Manages operational excellence, technology infrastructure, and supports business expansion. Drives organizational efficiency and strategic initiatives.

name: Stéphane Cerutti
title: Head of Credit
bio: Leads the credit strategy team with deep expertise in distressed debt, corporate credit, and structured finance. Manages portfolio of over $120 billion in credit assets.

name: Craig Farr
title: Head of Equity & Special Situations
bio: Oversees private equity and special situations investments. Focuses on value creation through operational improvements and strategic initiatives.

name: Bruce Karsh
title: Global Head of Client Relationships
bio: Manages client relationships and investment solutions. Ensures client satisfaction and develops tailored investment strategies for institutional investors.

name: Barbara Novick
title: Head of Real Assets
bio: Leads the real assets investment program including infrastructure, energy, and commodities. Focuses on resilient, long-duration cash flow generating investments.

name: David Sorkin
title: Global Head of Risk Management
bio: Oversees risk management framework and compliance. Ensures all investments meet risk parameters and regulatory requirements.

name: Jennifer Yoon
title: Chief Financial Officer
bio: Manages financial planning, capital allocation, and investor relations. Responsible for financial strategy and operational budgeting.

name: John Frank
title: General Counsel
bio: Leads legal and compliance functions across the organization. Manages regulatory matters and ensures corporate governance best practices.
